settings.title: Settings
settings.disableAuthMessage: This will remove password protection from the web UI. Anyone on your network will be able to access and modify your bridge configuration.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome to Home Assistant Matter Hub
dashboard.welcomeDescription: Bridge your Home Assistant devices to Matter controllers like Apple Home, Google Home, and Amazon Alexa.
dashboard.successMessage: Your bridges are connected to {{count}} controller fabric(s). Devices should now appear in your controller app.
dashboard.noBridgesHint: No bridges configured yet. Use the Bridge Wizard or create one manually.

bridge.name: Bridge Name
bridge.pairHint: Pair this bridge with your controller
bridge.pairDescription: Open your controller app (Apple Home, Google Home, or Amazon Alexa), add a new accessory, and scan the QR code below or enter the manual pairing code. Make sure your controller is on the same network as Home Assistant.
bridge.serverModeRecommended: Server Mode Recommended for Robot Vacuums
bridge.serverModeDescription: This bridge contains a robot vacuum in bridged mode. Apple Home and Alexa will show the bridge as an additional device, resulting in duplicate entries. Enable Server Mode to expose the vacuum as a standalone Matter device for full Siri/Alexa voice command support and no duplicates.
bridge.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this bridge?
bridge.refreshHint: New devices and changes on labels are discovered every 30 seconds.
bridge.serverModeSingleDeviceNote: Note: Server Mode requires the vacuum to be the only device on this bridge. Please remove other entities from this bridge first, then enable Server Mode in the bridge settings.
bridge.serverModeEnabled: Server Mode enabled. The bridge will restart with your vacuum as a standalone device.
bridge.fabricTooltip: A fabric represents a connection to a Matter controller (e.g., Apple Home, Google Home, Alexa). Each controller creates one fabric when paired.
bridge.forceSyncTooltip: Push all current device states to connected controllers
bridge.bridgeNotRunning: Bridge is not running. Start the bridge to see pairing information.
bridge.noFabrics: No controllers connected yet. Scan the QR code with your Matter controller to pair this bridge.
bridge.noFilters: No filters configured. All supported entities will be exposed.
bridge.scanQrCode: Scan this QR code with your Matter controller (Apple Home, Google Home, Alexa, etc.) to add this bridge to another ecosystem.
bridge.appleHomeWarning: This bridge uses Extended Flat mode. Only disable this if you exclusively use Apple Home.
bridge.googleHomeWarning: This may cause issues with Apple Home and Google Home.
bridge.confirmResetMessage: This will remove all pairing information and reset the bridge to its initial state. Connected controllers will lose access. This cannot be undone.
bridge.confirmDeleteMessage: This will permanently delete the bridge, all its pairings, and entity mappings. Connected controllers will lose access. This cannot be undone.
bridge.importParseFailed: Failed to parse import file. Please select a valid export file.

mapping.title: Entity Mappings
mapping.saved: Mapping saved for {{entityId}}. Restart the bridge to apply changes.
mapping.noMappings: No custom entity mappings configured. Use mappings to override Matter device types, set custom names, or disable specific entities.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

diagnostics.title: Live Diagnostics
diagnostics.noEvents: No events match the current filters.

startup.title: Startup Order
startup.description: Drag and drop bridges to set the startup order. Lower positions start first.
startup.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes to the startup order.

areaSetup.title: Area Setup
areaSetup.heading: Area-based Bridge Setup
areaSetup.description: Automatically create one bridge per Home Assistant area. Each bridge will include all supported entities from that area.
areaSetup.noAreas: No areas with supported entities found in Home Assistant. Make sure your devices are assigned to areas in HA.

lockCredentials.title: Lock Credentials
lockCredentials.lockEntityHelperText: The Home Assistant entity ID of the lock
lockCredentials.confirmDeleteMessage: This will permanently delete the PIN credential for {{entity}}. This cannot be undone.

labels.title: Filter Reference
labels.info: Browse all available filter values for your bridge configuration. Click any value to copy it to your clipboard.
labels.labelsHint: Use with filter type "entity_label" or "device_label". You can use either the display name or the label_id.
labels.noLabels: No labels found in Home Assistant. Create labels under Settings > Labels.
labels.areasHint: Use with filter type "area". Areas are also used for automatic room assignment in Matter controllers.
labels.noAreas: No areas found in Home Assistant. Create areas under Settings > Areas.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.description: Create a full backup of your bridges and entity mappings, or restore from a previous backup.
backup.configBackupDesc: Export bridge configurations and entity mappings.
backup.configBackupNote: Bridges will need to be re-commissioned after restore.
backup.fullBackupDesc: Includes Matter identity files (keypairs, fabric credentials).
backup.fullBackupWarning: Preserves commissioning state across restores. DONT SHARE!
backup.restoreDesc: Upload a previously created backup file to restore bridges and configurations.
backup.restartMessage: Bridges have been restored from backup. A restart is required for the changes to take effect.
backup.restartNote: The application will restart and you may need to refresh this page.

updateChecker.title: Software Updates
updateChecker.upToDate: You are running the latest version.
updateChecker.notAvailable: Update check not available in this version
updateChecker.instructionAddon: Update via Settings → Add-ons in Home Assistant.
updateChecker.instructionDocker: Pull the latest image and recreate your container.

bridgeWizard.title: Bridge Setup Wizard
bridgeWizard.invertCoverDescription: Swap open/close direction for covers. Use this if your covers show the wrong position in Matter controllers.
bridgeWizard.includeHiddenDescription: Also expose entities that are marked as hidden in Home Assistant.
bridgeWizard.portAutoAssign: Automatically assigned to next available port
bridgeWizard.bridgeInfoDescription: Give your bridge a name and port.
bridgeWizard.serverModeTooltip: Required for Robot Vacuums to work with Apple Home (Siri) and Alexa. Server Mode bridges support only ONE device.
bridgeWizard.entityFilterDescription: Configure which entities should be included in this bridge.
bridgeWizard.serverModeEntityHint: Server Mode supports only ONE device. Enter the exact entity ID (e.g., vacuum.my_vacuum).
bridgeWizard.templatePreConfigured: Pre-configured by template. Edit in the full editor after creation.
bridgeWizard.wildcardHint: Use * for all, or patterns like light.*, switch.*
bridgeWizard.commaHint: Enter specific entity IDs separated by commas
bridgeWizard.templateDescription: Choose a template to get started quickly, or skip to create a custom bridge.
bridgeWizard.controllerDescription: Which Matter controller will you use? This optimizes feature flags for your controller.
bridgeWizard.controllerHint: You can always adjust feature flags in the next steps or after bridge creation.
bridgeWizard.templateApplied: Template "{{name}}" applied. Customize the name and port below.
bridgeWizard.filterPreConfiguredFrom: Filter is pre-configured from the "{{name}}" template. You can adjust it below.
bridgeWizard.featureFlagsDescription: Feature flags control how devices are exposed to Matter controllers.
bridgeWizard.selectFlags: Select the flags that match your setup.
bridgeWizard.bridgesCreated: {{count}} bridge(s) already created in this session

translationEditor.title: Translation Editor
translationEditor.info: Edit translations directly in your browser. Changes are saved locally and applied instantly. Export your translations to submit them to the project.
translationEditor.removeLanguageConfirm: Remove custom language "{{name}}"? All local edits for this language will be lost.
translationEditor.importFailed: Failed to import: invalid JSON format.
